specifications.name: Wall Fire Rating Validation
specifications.description: Validates that walls have the required fire rating property with acceptable values

requirements.label: Pset_WallCommon.FireRating
requirements.description: FireRating data shall be {'enumeration': ['REI30', 'REI60', 'REI90']} and in the dataset Pset_WallCommon
